description: The chart uses a bar encoding for continuous numeric data, making it appear as though each data point is a discrete category being compared rather than part of a continuous relationship between years of experience and compensation. The dense forest of narrow bars obscures any trend or correlation between the two variables, and multiple overlapping bars at the same x-position create visual confusion since only the tallest bar is visible. A reader would struggle to understand the distribution or direction of the relationship between coding experience and salary.
